title: Enforcer Patrol
narrativeContext: A patrol of three armored enforcers bearing the Shattered King's sigil rounds the corner. They move with practiced menace, scanning for anyone who looks like trouble — or anyone worth interrogating.
objectives: Avoid or defeat the enforcer patrol
Do not reveal your identity or destination

title: The Survivor's Bargain
narrativeContext: Mira, a sharp-eyed woman in her forties with a scar across her jaw, studies you with open suspicion. She has kept these survivors alive through ruthless pragmatism. She will not help you for free — but she might if you can convince her you are worth the risk.
objectives: Earn Mira's trust through conversation or demonstration
Learn the layout of the Shrouded Vale from her

title: The Collapsed Archive
narrativeContext: A section of the old city archive has partially collapsed, but the lower levels remain intact. Fenwick's coded message mentioned a cache hidden here — records he could not carry when he fled. The rubble is unstable and the enforcers patrol nearby.
objectives: Navigate the collapsed archive without triggering a cave-in

title: The Darkwood Predator
narrativeContext: Something moves between the trees — too large to be a wolf, too quiet to be a bear. The cataclysm warped the creatures of the Darkwood, fusing them with fragments of shattered stone and crackling energy. This one has been following you for the last mile.
objectives: Survive the encounter with the Darkwood predator
Identify what the creature once was

title: The Resistance Interrogation
narrativeContext: The resistance fighters are not welcoming. Their leader, a former soldier named Davan, has seen too many informants to trust a stranger. He sits across from you with a knife on the table between you, asking questions that have no safe answers.
objectives: Convince Davan you are not an enforcer spy
Learn the resistance's plan for the Ruined Keep

title: The Keep's Hidden Passage
narrativeContext: The resistance's map shows a drainage tunnel beneath the keep's eastern wall — unused since the cataclysm shifted the water table. The tunnel is narrow, partially flooded, and passes directly beneath the guard barracks. One wrong move and the entire garrison wakes up.
objectives: Navigate the drainage tunnel without alerting the garrison
Locate the vault entrance from the inside

title: The King's Champion
narrativeContext: The Shattered King's champion blocks the citadel's inner gate — a warrior encased in armor forged from shattered stone and bound together by cataclysmic energy. They were once a hero of the old world. The King broke them and rebuilt them as something else.
objectives: Defeat or bypass the King's champion
Determine if the champion can be freed from the King's influence

title: The Memory Fracture
narrativeContext: The Ashen Wastes pulse with residual cataclysmic energy. Walking through them triggers fragments of memory — not yours, or perhaps they are. You see the old world as it was: whole, beautiful, and doomed. You see yourself standing at the center of it all.
objectives: Navigate the memory fractures without losing yourself in the visions
Piece together the truth of your role in the cataclysm

title: The Throne Room Confrontation
narrativeContext: The Shattered King sits on a throne built from the bones of the old world. He is old, and tired, and he has been waiting for you. He knows your name — your real name, the one you lost with your memories. He says: 'You built this world. You broke it. And now you have come to judge me for finishing what you started.'
objectives: Hear the Shattered King's full account of the cataclysm
Make the final choice: destroy, redeem, or become
